0.text: Linear consolidation area containing air bronchograms in the left lung lower lobe superior segment

1.text: Surrounding ground-glass density pulmonary nodules in the left lung lower lobe superior segment

2.text: Several nodular appearances in both lungs

3.text: Largest nodular appearance being 1 cm in diameter in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Centrally located thin-walled air cyst in the lower lobe of the left lung
